title: Uruguayan Savory Potato Burger
description: A delicious twist on the classic burger, featuring Uruguayan flair with savory flavors and crispy potatoes.
instructions: 2. Cut the potatoes into thin slices and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Bake the potatoes in the oven for 15-20 minutes or until crispy.
4. Meanwhile, cook the burger according to package instructions.
5. In a small pan, heat the savory paste over medium heat.
6. Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
7. Assemble the burger by placing the cooked burger on a bun, topping with the crispy potatoes, and drizzling with the savory garlic sauce.
9. Note: If desired, add additional toppings such as cheese, lettuce, or tomato.
